active.name: Supercharged
active.effects: Removes all {{tip|crowd control}} debuffs (except {{tip|Airborne}}) from your champion and grants you {{tip|Cc-immune|total crowd control immunity}} for the next 3 seconds (20 second cooldown).

effects_structured.raw: Active: Remove all crowd control debuffs except airborne.
Active: Gain total crowd control immunity for 3s.

schema_notes.effects_structured: Parsed from passive/active text for simulation use.
context_notes: Execution model: Supercharged is an instant auto-targeted self-cast active with no cast time that does not break stealth and does not interrupt channels.
Behavior branching: on activation, it first cleanses non-airborne crowd control debuffs, then applies 3 seconds of total crowd control immunity.

Availability/economy note: this distributed item is Arena-scoped via Prismatic Item Anvils; Tier-1 datasets expose reconciliation prices (total 1000 / sell 400) while page-level presentation shows anvil-style acquisition (cost 0 / sell 2000).
